symphony.description: Symphony channel configuration. Either fill in the inline fields (single account, accountId='default') or use the `accounts` map for multi-account setups.

relayUrl.description: Optional Symphony relay URL for the key-manager pubkey endpoint. Defaults to podUrl.

privateKeyPath.description: Absolute path to the bot's RSA private key (PKCS#8 PEM).

datafeedTag.description: Override the Datafeed v5 tag used to find existing feeds across restarts. Defaults to openclaw-<accountId>.

jwtTtlSec.description: Override the bot JWT TTL in seconds. Default 290.

allowedUsers.description: Whitelist of users allowed to interact with the bot. Each entry is matched against the sender: digits-only => userId, contains '@' => email, otherwise => username. When omitted or empty, all users are allowed. Filter runs BEFORE LLM dispatch.

allowedRooms.description: Whitelist of room/group streamIds the bot will engage with. Applies ONLY to non-direct conversations (ROOM/MIM); 1:1 IMs bypass this filter. When omitted or empty, all rooms are allowed. Filter runs BEFORE LLM dispatch.

denyDmsByDefault.description: Default DM policy. When true (the default), DMs require the sender to be in allowedUsers — if allowedUsers is unset/empty, all DMs are blocked. Set to false to restore the permissive legacy behavior (DMs open to anyone when allowedUsers is unset).

defaultAccount.description: Account id selected when no accountId is provided. Defaults to the first key under `accounts`, or 'default'.

accounts.description: Named accounts for multi-tenant deployments. Keyed by accountId.
